title: fumaria media
intro: Fumaria media, also known as Persian violet or small corydalis, is a flowering plant species belonging to the fumitory family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antispasmodic. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as alleviating symptoms of anxiety, insomnia, and menstrual cramps, as well as aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Fumaria media can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
